senses.def_en: an observer of an event, esp. a sports contest
senses.example: Football draws crowds of spectators around the world.
senses.example_zh: 足球吸引了全世界众多的观众。

senses.def_en: an individual and personal judgment; an opinion
senses.example: What are your views on globalization?
senses.example_zh: 你对全球化有何高见？

senses.example: The aircraft has disappeared from view.
senses.example_zh: 飞机从视野中消失了。

senses.example: a room with view
senses.example_zh: 能看见美丽风景的房间

senses.def_en: to think of sth. in a particular way; regard
senses.example: Has the matter been viewed from the taxpayers' standpoint?
senses.example_zh: 这个问题是否从纳税人的立场上考虑过？

senses.example: The onlooker affirmed the fact to be true.
senses.example_zh: 这位旁观者断言这是事实。

senses.example: It is always the latest song that an audience applauds the most. (Homer)
senses.example_zh: 听众掌声最热烈的，总是最后一曲。(荷马)

entries.mnemonic: ob(to)+serve(服务)→侍候在(主人)面前，以察言观色→观察

senses.example: It is easy to observe the great changes in the city.
senses.example_zh: 这个城市的巨大变化显而易见。

senses.def_en: to watch sb. or sth. carefully
senses.example: He observes carefully but says little.
senses.example_zh: 他总是仔细观察，很少说话。

senses.def_en: to say or write what you have notice about a situation
senses.example: Keynes observed that humans fall into two classes.
senses.example_zh: 凯恩斯说人类分为两个阶级。

senses.def_en: to do what a custom, rule, law, etc., says you should do
senses.example: The UN has called on both sides to observe the ceasefire.
senses.example_zh: 联合国已要求双方遵守停火协议。

derivatives: observer n. 观察者；评论者 // observation n. 观察；言论；观察力

senses.example: an amateur performance
senses.example_zh: 业余表演

senses.def_en: the act of performing a work or role
senses.example: He is very conscientious in the performance of his duties.
senses.example_zh: 他非常认真地履行职责。

senses.example: Andy's performance in the exams was disappointing.
senses.example_zh: 安迪的考试成绩令人失望。

derivatives: performer n. 表演者，演奏者

senses.example: After simmering the meat and vegetables skim the fat from the surface.
senses.example_zh: 把肉和蔬菜炖好后，再撇去表面的油脂。

senses.example: seagulls skimming the waves
senses.example_zh: 掠过浪尖的海鸥

senses.def_en: to read or glance through quickly or superficially
senses.example: She skimmed the sports page to find out who had won the game.
senses.example_zh: 她浏览体育新闻版，想知道谁赢了那场比赛。

senses.example: Give me a moment to skim through these memos before the meeting.
senses.example_zh: 开会前给我片刻时间浏览一下这些备忘录。

senses.def_en: to look at carefully, esp. in search of sth.
senses.example: He scanned the doctor's face for a sign of hope.
senses.example_zh: 他细察医生的神色看是否还有希望。

senses.example: All luggage has to be scanned at the airport.
senses.example_zh: 所有行李在飞机场都得接受扫描检查。

senses.example: Many people like to scan the newspaper while having breakfast.
senses.example_zh: 许多人喜欢在吃早餐的时候浏览一下报纸。

senses.example: a body/brain scan
senses.example_zh: 全身/脑扫描

entries.mnemonic: over(beyond)+look(看)→跳过了该看的东西→忽视

senses.def_en: to fail to notice; ignore deliberately

extras.content: with a view to 为了，为的是 // in view of 鉴于，考虑到 In view of our long-standing business relation, we'll make special effort to fill your order. 考虑到我们长期的业务关系，我们将尽力供足贵方订货。
